settings.heading: Trade In.
settings.subtext: Get store credit for your old clubs — applied directly to your Northcrest account for use online or in-store at the range.

settings.name: Callaway Quantum Max Driver
settings.description: AI-optimized face. Max distance off the tee. One of our most-asked-about clubs right now.

settings.name: Mizuno JPX Forged Irons (Graphite)
settings.description: Chromoly construction. Tour-proven feel with distance built in. A Mizuno staple for a reason.

settings.name: Blue Tees Captain Air GPS Rangefinder
settings.description: Laser + GPS in one device. Slope, wind, and altitude compensation. Know your exact number every time.

settings.name: TaylorMade TP5x Golf Balls (dozen)
settings.description: 5-layer tour ball. Max distance, low spin off the driver, exceptional greenside control.

settings.showcase_subtext: A typical trade-in runs $50–$200 depending on your clubs. Here's what that looks like applied against popular items on our floor right now — not hypotheticals, actual gear in stock.
settings.showcase_footnote: Prices shown are illustrative examples based on current pro shop inventory. Trade-in values are estimates and subject to final verification at the time of in-store redemption.
settings.terms:
Trade-in credit is issued as store credit to your Northcrest customer account and may be applied toward pro shop merchandise. Credit has no cash value and is non-transferable. Quoted values are estimates based on current market data provided by NextRound Golf. Final credit amount is subject to in-store inspection and must match the submitted quote; if clubs do not match the condition described, the offer may be adjusted at the time of redemption.

Northcrest Golf Driving Range reserves the right to modify or discontinue the trade-in program at any time.
